name_en: Top Quality Original with Full Packaging
name_cn:
Top Quality Original with Full Packaging
Tote's latest Autumn/Winter series, finally released the shoulder strap version, a Tote bag that frees your hands, exquisite Roy Tiger, embellished with letter logo, exquisite craftsmanship, paired with adjustable and detachable shoulder strap, greatly improving practicality, looks high-end and casual
size:21.5*13*7.5cm
